info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Journey Optimizer API
info.description:
The Adobe Journey Optimizer API enables programmatic management of customer journeys, messages, campaigns, offers, and content across channels including email, push, SMS, and in-app. It provides endpoints for creating and managing journey orchestrations, configuring offer decisioning, managing content templates, and accessing journey execution data.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer

item.name: journey
journeys
{journeyId}
publish
Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Publish a Journey

request.description: Publishes a draft journey, making it live and ready to receive qualifying profiles. Published journeys begin processing entry events immediately.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Journey cannot be published due to validation errors.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: stop
Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Stop a Journey

request.description: Stops an active journey. No new profiles will enter the journey, and existing profiles will exit at the next activity.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Journey

request.description: Retrieves the full definition of a customer journey by its ID, including entry conditions, activities, transitions, and channel configurations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Journey

request.description: Updates a draft journey with new configuration. Only journeys in draft status can be modified.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Invalid journey definition or journey is not in draft status.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Journey

request.description: Deletes a journey in draft or closed status. Active journeys must be stopped before deletion.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Journey is active and cannot be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud List Journeys

request.description: Returns a paginated list of all customer journeys configured in the organization. Each journey includes its ID, name, status, and version.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Journey

request.description: Creates a new customer journey with the specified entry conditions, activities, and channel actions. The journey starts in draft status and must be published to become active.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
